---
title: "STEPS Survey Fact Sheet"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
params:
  config: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 10)
library(flextable); library(ggplot2); library(glue); library(patchwork)
library(stepssurvey)

cfg           <- params$config
indicators    <- readRDS(file.path(cfg$data_path, "..", "processed", "indicators.rds"))
key_indicators <- readRDS(file.path(cfg$data_path, "..", "processed", "key_indicators.rds"))
plots         <- readRDS(file.path(cfg$data_path, "..", "processed", "plots.rds"))
```

---

**`r cfg$country_name` | WHO STEPS NCD Risk Factor Survey | `r cfg$survey_year`**
Ages `r cfg$age_min`–`r cfg$age_max` years

---

## Key Risk Factor Prevalence

```{r overview-chart, fig.height=7}
plots$overview
```

---

## Risk Factor Summary Table

```{r key-table}
key_indicators |>
  mutate(
    Prevalence = paste0(round(estimate, 1), "% (", round(lower, 1), "–", round(upper, 1), ")")
  ) |>
  select(Domain = domain, `Risk Factor` = indicator, `Prevalence (95% CI)` = Prevalence) |>
  flextable() |>
  theme_vanilla() |>
  bold(part = "header") |>
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#00427A") |>
  color(part = "header", color = "white") |>
  merge_v(j = "Domain") |>
  valign(j = "Domain", valign = "top") |>
  autofit()
```

---

## By Sex

```{r sex-dashboard, fig.height=8}
if (!is.null(plots$sex_dashboard)) plots$sex_dashboard
```

---

*This fact sheet was generated using the WHO STEPS R analysis pipeline.*
*Survey year: `r cfg$survey_year` | Country: `r cfg$country_name`*
